## Description
Briefly describe the changes in this PR.

## Related Issue
Closes #ISSUE_NUMBER

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Smart contract change (requires gas/re-deployment review)

## Checklist
- [ ] I have formatted my code (`cargo fmt` / `ruff format` / Prettier)
- [ ] I have linted my code (`cargo clippy` / `ruff check` / ESLint)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`cargo test` / `pytest` / Vitest)
- [ ] I have updated documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have added a changeset if this is a notable change

## Smart Contract Changes (if applicable)
- [ ] Contract tests pass (`cargo test`)
- [ ] Gas costs have been benchmarked
- [ ] Contract has been deployed to Testnet for review

Any additional context for reviewers.
